sections.title: After Anti-Santa and Jack Frost's duel

lines.speaker: Paul
lines.text: Is it over?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I can't hear anything? It might be?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Is someone in there?

lines.speaker: Paul
lines.text: N-n-n-no... go away...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh okay, fair enough.

lines.speaker: Mary
lines.text: Wait! Come back, we need your help.

lines.speaker: Mary
lines.text: Jack Frost locked us in here when he stormed into our bakery. We tried to stop him from messing up our production, but he got grumpy.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I ran into one of your bakers outside, he said you were in trouble.

lines.speaker: Paul
lines.text: Oh Remy is still alive! We thought Jack fed him to the Icelord.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Where's the key? The door looks locked to me.

lines.speaker: Paul
lines.text: I thought you had it, Mary.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well I thought you had it, Paul.

lines.speaker: Paul
lines.text: Don't you think I'd have opened the door if I had it?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Don't you think I would have opened the door as well!

lines.speaker: Paul
lines.text: Great, now I'm locked in here with you for the rest of my life.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Woah calm down! If it's not in there, it must be out here. Let me look for it.

lines.speaker: Icelord
lines.text: RAAAAAAAAAAAWR

lines.speaker: Paul
lines.text: Ooooh that sounds like it hurt!

lines.speaker: Mary
lines.text: Are you okay dear? That sounded quite nasty.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well, I found the key.

lines.speaker: Paul
lines.text: That's great, come on let us out then.

lines.speaker: Mary
lines.text: Yes hurry up, we need to get back on schedule.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That's going to be a problem, it's in the cage with the Icelord.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I've got no way to get it with the Icelord there.

lines.speaker: Paul
lines.text: Did you try telegrabbing it?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm stumped, I can't find the key.

lines.speaker: Paul
lines.text: You've looked around the bakery and no luck?

lines.speaker: Mary
lines.text: If it's not in here or in the back room, it must be in the cage with the Icelord.

lines.speaker: Paul
lines.text: It wouldn't be safe to go in there.

lines.speaker: Paul
lines.text: Could you try telegrabbing it?

lines.speaker: Mary
lines.text: That won't work, the Icelord's magic will interfere.

lines.speaker: Paul
lines.text: Hmm... You're going to need a way to protect yourself from the Icelord.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Don't suppose you have an Anti-Icelord Shield lying around here then?

lines.speaker: Mary
lines.text: I don't, do you Paul?

lines.speaker: Paul
lines.text: No I don't...

lines.speaker: Paul
lines.text: But I do have a genius idea, we'll use Gingerbread!

lines.speaker: Paul
lines.text: Before Jack locked us up, I saw him using the Icelord to ice his Gingerbread Gnomes. They did a great job of absorbing his breath.

lines.speaker: Paul
lines.text: You'll need to make a Gingerbread Gnome big enough to absorb the Icelord's breath.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How am I going to do that?

lines.speaker: Paul
lines.text: Our usual recipe uses: one cinnamon, one ginger, one flour and one egg, we put them into that big machine you see to your left.

lines.speaker: Paul
lines.text: Try using more of each ingredient till you get the right combination? Possibly tripling the amount of each ingredient might work.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: This is such a ridiculous idea, guess I have no choice....

lines.speaker: Paul
lines.text: Come back to us if you need some more help.

sections.title: Talking to the door without having made the shield.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What ingredients did I need again?

lines.speaker: Paul
lines.text: You'll need ginger, cinnamon, flour and eggs. We usually only use one of each, maybe tripling the amount of each will work.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Great thanks, I'll see what I can do.

sections.title: Talking to the door having made the shield.
After getting the key from the cage

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I found the key!

lines.speaker: Paul
lines.text: That's great! Now hurry up and open the door.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: There you go, unlocked without an issue.

lines.speaker: Paul
lines.text: Wow, you managed to do that so quickly! Without any help from us.

lines.speaker: Mary
lines.text: You're very impressive, what a coincidence that you knew to make a giant piece of gingerbread to protect yourself.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ha ha, yeah, it was no problem.

lines.speaker: Mary
lines.text: Well, thanks for freeing us!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I can't believe that actually worked....

lines.speaker: Paul
lines.text: ...Me too, I thought you'd be turned into icing for sure.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So you're telling me you weren't even sure it would!?

lines.speaker: Paul
lines.text: It worked out didn't it? We're free to continue making Gingerbread Gnomes.

lines.speaker: Mary
lines.text: That was extremely reckless, Paul, but you're right, it did work out in the end.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: ...fine. I should go tell Santa the good news, the bakery is back in operation.

lines.speaker: Mary
lines.text: We'll be back in full production in no time!

lines.speaker: Paul
lines.text: What do we do about the Icelord in the cage?

lines.speaker: Mary
lines.text: Maybe Jack was onto something by using it to ice the Gingerbread Gnomes.

lines.speaker: Mary
lines.text: You should take the giant piece of gingerbread you made and show it to Santa, he'll know we're back in business then.

lines.speaker: Paul
lines.text: Alright, time for you to go, we need to get back into production.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So I made the shield, now what?

lines.speaker: Paul
lines.text: Fantastic! Now you need to enter the Icelord's cage.

lines.speaker: Paul
lines.text: Don't worry, I'm sure this idea will work, just make sure to equip it before you go in.

lines.speaker: Paul
lines.text: Go away, we're busy trying to catch up.

sections.title: Attempting to enter the workshop after completing the event

lines.speaker: Paul
lines.text: Go away, we're busy trying to catch up.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Just quickly, Santa said you shouldn't use the Icelord to ice your gnomes.

lines.speaker: Paul
lines.text: Why not?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Something about Icelord saliva not being safe to eat.

lines.speaker: Paul
lines.text: Oh, thanks for telling us, we'll go back to using normal icing.
